summary: Comprehensive smoke test of the redesigned ClientDesk AI landing page, key flows, service detail page, admin dashboard, chatbot, and backend endpoints. All 8 frontend flows and all 3 backend endpoints passed. End-to-end integration verified: contact form submission created a lead visible in the admin dashboard.
passed: Backend POST /api/leads returns 200 with lead ID and persisted fields
Backend POST /api/chat returns 200 with AI reply
Backend POST /api/admin/login returns 200 with JWT token
Landing page renders all 10 redesigned sections (hero, pillars, services, how-it-works, case-studies, testimonials, pricing, faq, final-cta, contact)
Pricing renders 3 tiers (Starter/Growth/Enterprise) with 'Most popular' badge on Growth
Contact form submits successfully and shows contact-success state
Floating chatbot opens (chatbot-open-btn) and returns AI reply
Service detail /service/ai-receptionist loads with title and embedded contact form
Admin login (admin@clientdeskai.com / ClientDesk@2026) redirects to /admin with leads + appointments tables populated
notes: Verified integration loop: lead submitted via contact form 'T1 Tester' appeared in /admin dashboard leads table immediately. Accent color #00E27A applied consistently. Test credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md used.
